title: September 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 7''' is the 250th day of the year (251st in leap years). There are 115 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[John Harkins]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Andy Bradford]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Doug Bradley]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Athena Karkanis]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 12|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 12]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] and [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] debuted with the episodes "[[The White Witch]]" and "[[The Cries of the Trees]]," respectively.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 116|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 116]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Tyrone Kearns]] is born.
*[[1993]] – [[Taylor Gray]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Mac OS X|Mac OS X]].
*[[2011]] – [[Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness 2|''Dark Times—Out of the Wilderness'' 2]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 6|''Poe Dameron'' 6]] published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Life Day Treasury]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' published in paperback as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2021 – ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2021 – ''[[The Last Command]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2021 – ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' published in paperback as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2021 – [[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)|''X-Wing: Rogue Squadron'' unabridged audiobook]] released as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Sticker Art Puzzles]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Vol. 1 – There is No Fear]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 27|''Star Wars'' (2020) 27]] published.
<noinclude>
